sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9959" key="a)nti/qroos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντίθροος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n9959.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">echoing, resounding,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4081.tlg001.perseus-grc1:118" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Coluth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">118</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.153</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Satyr.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
